llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 10.1 (Approval of December 9th Board Minutes) was moved from consent items to action items. Board President stated: 'So any changes to the agenda? Yeah, so we need to move 10.1 to action. Right. Because I was not a trustee for that board meeting.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve 10.2 through 10.7. So moved.
